sprints.title: Terminal-triage conclusion (backend)
sprints.notes: Resumed and finished by session a9a39fb2 (commit 0577d7a). 41/41 tests green; typecheck/lint/lint-invariants clean for sprint files. Constructor overloads added to TriageIncidentUseCase to clear LSP excess-property check on deps-object call sites. Branch not yet pushed — orchestrator will batch-push after Sprint 03.

sprints.title: Stale-investigation safety net (web)
sprints.notes: Commit 190f757. 1078/1078 dashboard tests pass; pnpm check (Biome) clean; turbo check-types clean. Helper falls back to updatedAt-only when latestEvidenceAt unavailable (Incident type has no feed-timestamp field). i18n keys rootCauseSlowHint added in en.json and pt-br.json. Bundle smoke test: dev server up on :3001 (Ready in 18.5s), no compile errors involving root-cause-card.tsx or is-stale-investigation.ts; only console error is 404 from /onboarding/choose-plan redirect (Clerk middleware sends unauthenticated users there but route is locale-nested). Visual hint render BLOCKED — requires Clerk session + tenant + stranded incident seed; deferred to staging post-deploy operator verification.

sprints.title: Backfill stranded incidents
sprints.notes: Commit d8dc643 (branched off Sprint 01 commit 0577d7a). 3/3 sprint tests pass; full unit suite 973 pass; sprint files typecheck/lint/lint-invariants clean. Tenant iteration uses --tenant <id> or BACKFILL_TENANT_IDS env fallback (no list-all API). Default dry-run; --apply writes. Operator must run on staging then prod after Sprint 01 deploys.
